positive: A minimalist celestial biome design featuring abstract, interconnected nebulae and crystalline botanical forms. Central composition focused on a powerful, stylized lunar crescent glowing with bioluminescent energy. The colors should be deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and ethereal gold against a matte black background. Use strong, graphic silhouettes and negative space for high contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Style: Neo-art deco, ethereal, abstract line work, clean vector aesthetic, high contrast, symmetrical balance, volumetric lighting.
